name: Laceration Repair — Scalp, Staples

cptCodes.display: Simple repair of superficial wounds of scalp/neck/axillae/external genitalia/trunk/extremities, ≤2.5 cm

diagnoses.display: Laceration without foreign body of scalp, initial encounter

otherSuppliesUsed: Skin staples, lidocaine 1% w/ epi, saline irrigation
otherPostInstructions: No shampoo for 24h; staple removal in 7–10 days at PCP
